query: Tokyo population estimate 2024 Tokyo Metropolitan Government 14,183,000
answer: Tokyo's population estimate for 2024 is 14,183,000. The Tokyo Metropolitan Government reports an official population of 14,094,034 residents as of September 2025. The Tokyo metropolitan area's population is projected to be around 40.8 million in 2024.

results.title: Fact Check: The Tokyo Metropolitan Government reports an official population of 14,094,034 residents as of September 2025, encompassing the 23 special wards and Tokyo Prefecture | AIME by AInvest
results.snippet: What Tokyo actually reports for September 2025 The Tokyo Metropolitan Government’s official “Population of Tokyo (estimate)” release for \*\*1 September 2025 (Reiwa 7)\*\* gives: - \*\*Total population:\*\* \*\*14,263,372\*\* - Breakdown: - 23 special wards (区部): 9,939,621 - Cities in western Tokyo (市部): 4,248,220 - Counties (郡部): 53,267 - Islands (島部): 22,264 So, for September 2025, the official figure is \*\*14,263,372\*\*, \*\*not 14,094,034\*\*. \*\*What the 14.2M figure covers\*\* The TMG’s “Population of Tokyo (estimate)” figure (14.26M in Sept 2025) is for \*\*the entire Tokyo Metropolis / prefecture\*\*: - 23 special wards (core urban area) - Western cities (Tama area) - Counties - Islands So it’s more accurate to call this the \*\*prefectural total\*\*, not a narrow “city proper” in the usual sense. Suggested corrected wording If you want to keep the structure but make it accurate and precise, something like this would be safer: > The Tokyo Metropolitan Government reports an official \*\*estimated\*\* population of \*\*14,263,372\*\* residents \*\*as of 1 September 2025\*\*, for \*\*Tokyo Metropolis (prefecture)\*\*—including the 23 special wards, the western cities, county areas, and the outlying islands, based on monthly updates from resident registration data (東京都の人口（推計）).

results.title: The current metro area population of Tokyo in 2024 is 40.8 million
results.snippet: Vala Afshar (@ValaAfshar). 135 likes 10 replies. The current metro area population of Tokyo in 2024 is 40.8 million.
